annotations.text: This diagram describes the percentages that move between parties from one election to the next

annotation.text: Forty percent of the people who support party P in one election will support party Q in the next
None of the people who support party P in one election will support party R in the next
Sixty percent of the people who support party P in one election will still support party P in the next
None of the people who support party Q in one election will support party P in the next
Forty percent of the people who support party Q in one election will support party R in the next
Sixty percent of the people who support party Q in one election will still support party Q in the next
Twenty percent of the people who support party R in one election will support party P in the next
Twenty percent of the people who support party R in one election will support party Q in the next
Sixty percent of the people who support party R in one election will still support party R in the next
